scripts.generate: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma generate; else prisma generate; fi'
scripts.migrate: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma migrate deploy; else prisma migrate deploy; fi'
scripts.migrate:dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma migrate dev; else prisma migrate dev; fi'
